creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

There are additional changes needed for all the haskell ports, so a 
global update for both lang/ghc and the ports would be more beneficial. 
GHC 6.10.x also has known problems on FreeBSD, and they should be fixed 
in a patch [1]. 

At the moment, the FreeBSD Haskell Effort [2] is working on a solution, 
including a Haskell .mk file for making such transitions easier. 

[1] http://hackage.haskell.org/trac/ghc/ticket/2673 
[2] http://freebsd.haskell.org
